description_long: This is a white disposable paper cup featuring the iconic green Starbucks logo on one side and a printed checklist for drink customization on the opposite side. The cup has a slightly flared rim and a smooth, cylindrical body that tapers gently towards the base. The checklist includes options for decaf, shots, syrup, milk, custom, and drink, with small boxes for marking selections. The Starbucks logo is prominently displayed, showing the green siren emblem. The cup's surface is matte with printed black and green text and graphics. There is no visible handle or lid, and the interior appears to be plain and unlined.
description: A white paper cup with the green Starbucks logo and a printed drink customization checklist, featuring a smooth, slightly flared rim and no handle or lid.
description_view_0: This view shows the drink customization checklist and some small printed text near the base.
description_view_1: This view reveals the left side of the green Starbucks logo, with part of the siren visible.
description_view_2: This view centers on the Starbucks logo, showing the siren's face and most of the emblem.
description_view_3: This view displays the full checklist, the word 'STARBUCKS' printed vertically, and the cautionary text at the base.
